---
title: "Introduktion til Livets Molekyler"
listing:
    type: table
    contents: 
        - "python_intro/te*/*.qmd"
    fields: [title]
    exclude:
        title: "*Extra*"
---

On this site you will find the exercises related to Python for the *Introduktion til Livets Molekyler* course. Use the sidebar or the table below to navigate the site. 

For each page you can download it as either PDF or docx from the menu on the rightside - 
alternatively you can [click here](downloads/IMoL-Python-course-notes.pdf) to download a combined version as pdf.
